title: Enna Saththam Indha Neram Lyrics Punnagai Mannan
stanzas:
enna satham indha neram
uyirin oliyaa
enna satham indha neram
nadhiyin oliya

kizhigal mutham tharuthaa
athanaal satham varuthaa
adada aa..

enna satham indha neram
uyirin oliyaa
enna satham indha neram
nadhiyin oliya

kannathil muthathin eeram
adhu kaayavillaiye
kangalil yen andha kanneer
adhu yaarale.

kanniyin kaluthai paarthal
manamaagavillaiye
kadhalan madiyil poothaal
oru poo pole.

mannavane un vizhiyaal
pen vizhiyai moodu.
aatharavaai sainthuvittaal
aariraaro paadu.

aariraro ivar yaar yevaro
bathil solvaar yaaro.

koonthalil nulaindha
kaigal oru kolam podutho.
thannilai marandha penmai
athai thaangaatho.

udhattil thudikkum vaarthai
adhu ularnthu ponatho.
ullangal thudikkkum osai
isai aagaatho.

mangai ival vaai thiranthaal
malligai poo vaasam.
kodai ellaam pen peyarai
ucharithe pesum.

yaar ivargal
iru poonguyilgal
ilam kadhal maanagal.

enna satham indha neram
uyirin oliyaa
enna satham indha neram
nadhiyin oliya

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Punnagai Mannan.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary singer S.P. Balasubramaniam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released in the year 1986.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enna Saththam Indha Neram, the protagonist reflects on the profound emotions tied to love and longing. The song beautifully captures the essence of romantic melancholy, making it a perfect fit for moments of introspection. Its heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody evoke a sense of nostalgia, transporting listeners to a place of deep emotional resonance. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil cinema and music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enna Saththam Indha Neram from the Punnagai Mannan is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voice of S.P. Balasubramaniam and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Its poignant lyrics by Vairamuthu add a layer of emotional depth, making it a must-listen for fans of classic Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: What sound is this time, is it the sound of life? What sound is this time, is it the sound of the river?
Will it give a kiss to the feet, will it bring sound? Oh, that...
What sound is this time, is it the sound of life? What sound is this time, is it the sound of the river?
The beauty in the eyes is not just a physical thing, those tears in the eyes, who knows their meaning?
Seeing the darkness of a maiden, it doesn't feel right, when a lover blooms in the heart, like a flower.
Oh king, close the eyes of the girl with your gaze. If you sing with that feeling, will it be a song?
Who are these people, who will answer who?
The hands that are entangled in the hair create a pattern. The forgotten nature of a woman cannot be endured.
The words that strike the heart, do they go away? The sounds that stir the hearts, do they become music?
When she opens her mouth, the fragrance of jasmine spreads. All the seasons will speak the name of the girl.
Who are these two lovebirds, young lovers?
What sound is this time, is it the sound of life? What sound is this time, is it the sound of the river?
